description: A curated collection of the Uniform Acts of the Organization for the Harmonization of Business Law in Africa.

documents.title: Uniform Act on General Commercial Law
documents.summary: The foundational commercial code for OHADA. Regulates merchants, commercial contracts, sales, and commercial registers.
documents.citation_format: OHADA Uniform Act on General Commercial Law (2010)

documents.title: Uniform Act on Commercial Companies
documents.summary: Governs the formation, management, and dissolution of commercial companies (SA, SARL, SNC, etc.) across OHADA jurisdictions.
documents.citation_format: OHADA Uniform Act on Commercial Companies (2014)

documents.title: Uniform Act on Securities
documents.summary: Regulates the creation, perfection, and enforcement of security interests (pledges, mortgages, liens) over movable and immovable property.

documents.title: Uniform Act on Simplified Forms of Commercial Companies
documents.summary: Provides streamlined rules for small businesses and sole proprietors (SUARL, EURL) to operate within the OHADA framework.
documents.citation_format: OHADA Uniform Act on Simplified Forms of Commercial Companies (2010)

documents.title: Uniform Act on Accounting Law
documents.summary: Establishes the SYSCOHADA accounting framework for all commercial entities in OHADA member states.
documents.citation_format: OHADA Uniform Act on Accounting Law (2017)

documents.title: Uniform Act on Insurance Contracts
documents.summary: Regulates the formation and execution of insurance contracts within the OHADA zone.
documents.citation_format: OHADA Uniform Act on Insurance Contracts (2011)

documents.title: Uniform Act on Arbitration
documents.summary: Sets out the rules for domestic and international commercial arbitration within the OHADA legal framework.

documents.title: Uniform Act on Transport of Goods by Road
documents.summary: Governs the carriage of goods by road across OHADA territories, including liability and documentation requirements.
documents.citation_format: OHADA Uniform Act on Transport of Goods by Road (2010)

documents.title: Uniform Act on Cooperative Societies
documents.summary: Provides the legal framework for the creation and operation of cooperative societies within the OHADA system.
documents.citation_format: OHADA Uniform Act on Cooperative Societies (2010)

documents.title: Uniform Act on Mediation
documents.summary: Establishes the legal framework for mediation as an alternative dispute resolution mechanism in OHADA.
